name: Pre-Schematic / Conceptual
objective: Win project or support go/no-go decision
accuracy: Order-of-magnitude; highest contingency; historical data only

name: Schematic Design
accuracy: Historical data, local market; no inflation/escalation/design contingency

name: Design Development
objective: Update budget with new information and plans
accuracy: Most recent costs for similar product; no inflation or design contingency

name: Construction Documents (Permit Set)
objective: Finalize budget for bank and ownership
accuracy: Full quantity take-offs; 3-deep sub coverage; proposal-based + takeoff/unit pricing
